167 E0500A_BHVR_INJR_SELF_CD E0500A_BHVR_INJR_SELF_CD E0500A Behavior Impact on Resident: Risk to Injure Self CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the identified symptoms (physical, verbal or other behavioral symptoms) put the resident at significant risk for physical illness or injury. -=Not assessed/no information
